_comment.purpose: Manual verdicts that survive re-scrapes. The classifier (pipeline/classify.js) applies these FIRST, before any rule. An override always wins.
_comment.matching: Each entry has a `match` object. The classifier tries `feature_ids` (exact dedupe-key match) first; if none match it falls back to `name_regex` (case-insensitive, tested against the place name). Use feature_ids for precision and name_regex as a durable fallback in case a place's feature ID changes between scrapes.
_comment.status_vocabulary: walk_in_confirmed | walk_in_unverified | remittance_first | online_only | noise. (The classifier also emits `unknown`, but that is never set via override.)
_comment.walk_in_confirmed_rule: ONLY set status=walk_in_confirmed when `evidence` contains a real verification (website 'how it works' language confirming an in-person cash counter, or a logged phone call). Never infer it from category/address alone.

fields.website: Official website URL, shown on the shop page (opens in new tab).
fields.live_rates_url: URL of the shop's own live/realtime rates page. Renders as a 'Live rates' badge linking out. Only set when the page genuinely shows current rates.
fields.match.name_regex: Case-insensitive regex string tested against place name. Fallback when feature_ids miss.
fields.match.feature_ids: Array of Google Maps feature IDs (0x..:0x..) this verdict applies to. Primary match key.
fields.status: One of the status vocabulary values.
fields.evidence: Human-readable proof string. Required for walk_in_confirmed; recommended for all.
fields.verified_phone: Template for a future phone-call verdict Kim can fill in: {date: 'YYYY-MM-DD', answer: 'yes'|'no'|'no_answer'}. Leave date/answer null until a call is made. When answer='yes' for cash walk-in, promote status to walk_in_confirmed and copy the call into evidence.

_comment.seed_provenance: Seeded 2026-06-04 from idea-grooming/currency-exchange-finder/research/maps-gap-analysis.md (Test 0 scrape of 2026-06-03). 35 ONLINE_ONLY_OFFICE places + known-noise brands + the Interchange hybrid correction.

overrides.evidence: KnightsbridgeFX.com 'How It Works': book online, fund by wire/EFT, receive by delivery or pickup. 'They are not able to accept payments by cash, cheque, or bank draft.' (verified 2026-06-03)
overrides.note: The canonical trap. 100 King St W #5700, office tower, no walk-in cash counter.

overrides.evidence: Out-of-GTA KnightsbridgeFX branches (Brampton, Halifax, Port Coquitlam, Langley, London, Hamilton) that leaked into the generic/Mississauga queries. Online-only brand AND outside the target geography.
overrides.note: Excluded as out-of-area noise; the brand is online-only regardless.

overrides.evidence: Site states 'do not engage in cash transactions'; WeChat-only consultation, RMB wholesale. Woodbine Business Centre office, not a counter. (verified 2026-06-03)
This listing IS MTFX Inc. (Suite 306, M-F office hours), an online payment-solutions provider. Second MTFX listing. (verified 2026-06-03)
MTFX is an online/wholesale FX brand (online payment solutions), no retail walk-in counter. Category 'Corporate office'. (verified 2026-06-03)
ricefx.com = boutique B2B FX for businesses (Spot FX, risk mitigation). No walk-in. (verified 2026-06-03)

No retail presence; B2B office, Google category 'Consultant'. (verified 2026-06-03)

Known wholesale FX brand, no retail counter. Category 'Corporate office'. (brand-confident 2026-06-03)

overrides.evidence: interchangefinancial.com confirms in-person pickup at physical locations ('pick up cash in-store... pay with Debit Card or Interac e-transfer'). HOWEVER it does NOT accept cash-in (debit/e-transfer only) -- a hybrid pickup model, NOT a traditional cash-in-cash-out counter. (verified 2026-06-03; recent review activity re-checked 2026-06-11)
overrides.note: Material correction from gap-analysis: reclassified ONLINE_ONLY -> WALK_IN_SHOP (UNCERTAIN). Kept as walk_in_unverified NOT walk_in_confirmed because the product question is 'takes YOUR cash at a counter' and the confirmed evidence is that it does NOT take cash-in. Flag for a phone call: 'Do you accept cash deposits in person?'

overrides.evidence: calforex.com location page: 'Conveniently located inside Eaton Centre, level 1 - Queen Street Entrance... over 50 currencies kept in stock', with posted mall hours (Mon-Sat 10-9, Sun 11-7). Review signal: ~167 Google reviews, activity through May/June 2026. (verified 2026-06-11)
overrides.note: Retail mall storefront, also listed in Cadillac Fairview's official Eaton Centre store directory. Rates quoted inside the online cash-reservation flow only, no public live-rates page -> no live_rates_url.

overrides.evidence: Review signal: 41+ reviews across Google/Yelp describing in-person cash-only exchange at the 437A Yonge St storefront ('venue primarily accepts cash transactions... bring cash for exchanges as debit and credit card payments are not accepted'; 'buys and sells 80 different currencies, open 7 days a week'), listing activity through March 2026. Registered MSB (College Currency Investments Inc.). (verified 2026-06-11)
overrides.note: Official site collegecurrency.ca appears dead (not indexed) -> evidence is the review signal + MSB registration, which meets the published review rule (10+ in-person-cash reviews with recent activity). Some aggregator reviews allege inflated ratings; rate quality not vouched for.

overrides.evidence: mycurrencyshoppe.com downtown location page: 'All currency exchange transactions must be completed in person at 279 Spadina Ave, and they only accept cash for payment in person.' Hours Mon-Fri 10:30-5:30. Review signal: 583 Google reviews, listing activity through May 2026. (verified 2026-06-11)
overrides.note: Operates as 'Currency Shoppe' (formerly Goldium FX, since 1991). Explicit in-person cash-only policy on its own site -- the strongest walk-in evidence downtown. Closed weekends. No published rates (site says call; rates differ by branch).

overrides.evidence: currencymart.net branch page: 'No appointment is needed -- just walk in... Bring foreign currency to any Currency Mart branch and receive Canadian dollars on the spot' (PATH concourse below 120 Adelaide St W). Publishes a branch-specific live rates page stated to update every 5 minutes. Review signal: 114 Google reviews (4.6), listing activity through April 2026. (verified 2026-06-11)
overrides.note: PATH concourse shop, not street level: enter 120 Adelaide St W, escalator behind the security desk down to the PATH. Closed Sundays.

overrides.evidence: Not a currency exchange: Toronto First Steps was a Brazilian study-abroad & immigration agency ('A sua Agência de Intercâmbio em Toronto' -- Portuguese 'intercâmbio' = student exchange, not currency exchange), offering English courses and immigration consulting. 439 University Ave 5th floor is a Regus serviced-office floor, and torontofirststeps.com is now an expired/parked domain. 1 Google review. (verified 2026-06-11)
overrides.note: The Google Maps 'currency exchange' category is almost certainly a mistranslation/SEO artifact of 'intercâmbio'. Listed grey as invalid (not hidden) so locals can validate.

overrides.evidence: silkroadex.ca: 'They provide genuine cash exchange downtown Toronto... open Monday through Saturday from 10:00 AM to 7:00 PM... the final rate will be confirmed at the time of your transaction in-store', at 301 Spadina Ave in Chinatown. Site publishes per-currency rate pages (/usd/, /jpy/, ...) with fresh 2026 dates. (verified 2026-06-11)
overrides.note: Phone on site matches listing. Rate pages actively maintained (CRC page dated 2 June 2026).

overrides.evidence: nhvnfx.com confirms the storefront at 222 Spadina Ave Unit 101C with in-store hours Mon-Fri 10:30-5:00; reviewers corroborate a cash-only in-person counter ('accepts cash-only transactions... not accepting debit cards'; 'the best USD/CAD FX rate that i found within the downtown toronto area'). (verified 2026-06-11)
overrides.note: Cash-only -- bring cash, no debit. No live-rates page (site says contact for current rates).

overrides.evidence: Real business (millionex.ca, operating since 2001) with a Toronto branch at 65 Wellesley St E Unit 200, weekday hours 10-6, offering 'both in-person and online' services -- but primarily an Iranian sarafi (IRR/toman remittance) and no explicit cash-counter wording found. (checked 2026-06-11)
overrides.note: Kept at call-ahead: plausible walk-in office, unconfirmed for walk-in CAD/USD cash. Candidate for a phone call.

overrides.evidence: The address + phone (111 Queens Quay W, 647-343-1011) belong to the long-running walk-in counter NET EXCHANGE (netmoneyexchange.com, ~77 Yelp reviews), and the Google listing itself carries 126 reviews -- but no website or directory ties the name 'RemitLand' to this address, so the branding/operator is unconfirmed. (checked 2026-06-11)
overrides.note: Likely a Google Maps rebrand of the Net Exchange counter at Harbourfront. Walk-in cash at the location is probably real; call to confirm who answers and whether they exchange cash walk-in.

overrides.evidence: Review signal: reviewers describe a multi-counter in-person exchange at 121 Yonge St ('the line up was quick and all counters (3 in total) was [open]'; 'Great exchange rate and super fast!'), ~4.5 across aggregators, listing activity through Dec 2025. FINTRAC-registered; formerly Cox & Kings. (verified 2026-06-11)
overrides.note: Hours Mon-Fri 10-6 (one source adds Sat 10-4). One source mentions a $3.50 per-transaction fee. No public live-rates page on ebixcash.ca.

overrides.evidence: TD's own announcement of the centre: 'The Foreign Exchange Centre maintains a broad selection of currencies and precious metals to offer immediate fulfillment of most cash orders to walk-in clients... a stand-alone location specializing in the sale of foreign cash.' Directory/Yelp listings current to June 2026 show it open Mon-Fri 8-6 at 55 King St W Concourse Level. (verified 2026-06-11)
overrides.note: A TD-run retail FX counter (50+ currencies in stock), distinct from a bank branch and open to walk-in public. TD's bank-wide converter shows today's cash rates -> live_rates_url.

overrides.evidence: Storefront at 69 Yorkville Ave #102 confirmed via the Bloor-Yorkville BIA directory and FINTRAC MSB registration M09351691 (foreign exchange dealing), but yorkfx.com could not be reached and no first-party 'visit us / cash' statement or in-person-cash review was found. 54 Google reviews (~3.0). (checked 2026-06-11)
overrides.note: yorkfx.com homepage is titled 'Retail Exchange Rates', suggesting a rate board -- recheck when the site is reachable. Candidate for a phone call.

overrides.evidence: Suite 2201, 250 Yonge St is the Canadian corporate office (22nd floor of an office tower) of ACE Money Transfer / Habib Express, an online remittance app. ACE's own FAQ states cash is not facilitated -- cash pickup happens at partner agents in destination countries, not at this office. The 1.9-star Google listing pattern matches app complaints on a corporate-office pin, not a shop. (verified 2026-06-11)
overrides.note: Mislabelled as a currency exchange shop on Google Maps. Listed grey as invalid so anyone can validate; if someone confirms a public counter at suite 2201, we will correct.
